Class BST

java.lang.Object
BST
public class BST extends Object
A Binary Search Tree (BST) storing Product objects ordered by price. Supports insertion, removal, searching, and retrieving products in a price range.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    BST.BSTNode
    root

    Description
    BST()
    Creates an empty BST.

    Method
    Description
    Product
    findMax()
    Returns the product with the maximum price in the entire BST.

    findMax(BST.BSTNode node)

    findMin()
    Returns the product with the minimum price in the entire BST.

    findMin(BST.BSTNode node)
    Finds the node with the minimum price in a subtree.

    Returns all products whose prices fall within a given range.
    void
    inorderTraversal()
    Prints the BST contents in ascending price order.
    void
    insert(Product p)
    Inserts a product into the BST based on its price.
    void
    remove(Product target)
    Removes a specific product from the BST (matches by price and ID).
    boolean
    search(double price)
    Searches for a product with the given price.

  • Field Details

    • root

      public BST.BSTNode root

  • Constructor Details

    • BST

      public BST()
      Creates an empty BST.

  • Method Details

    • search

      public boolean search(double price)
      Searches for a product with the given price.
      Parameters:
      price - The price to search for.
      Returns:
      true if a product with that price exists, false otherwise.

    • findMin

      public BST.BSTNode findMin(BST.BSTNode node)
      Finds the node with the minimum price in a subtree.
      Parameters:
      node - Root of subtree.
      Returns:
      Node with the smallest price.

    • findMax

      public BST.BSTNode findMax(BST.BSTNode node)
      Finds the node with the maximum price in a subtree.
      Parameters:
      node - Root of subtree.
      Returns:
      Node with the highest price.

    • findMin

      public Product findMin()
      Returns the product with the minimum price in the entire BST.
      Returns:
      Product with lowest price or null if tree is empty.

    • findMax

      public Product findMax()
      Returns the product with the maximum price in the entire BST.
      Returns:
      Product with highest price or null if tree is empty.

    • remove

      public void remove(Product target)
      Removes a specific product from the BST (matches by price and ID).
      Parameters:
      target - The target product to remove.

    • getProductsInRange

      public Set<Product> getProductsInRange(double min, double max)
      Returns all products whose prices fall within a given range.
      Parameters:
      min - Minimum price (inclusive).
      max - Maximum price (inclusive).
      Returns:
      A Set of all products in the range.

    • insert

      public void insert(Product p)
      Inserts a product into the BST based on its price.
      Parameters:
      p - Product to insert.

    • inorderTraversal

      public void inorderTraversal()
      Prints the BST contents in ascending price order.
